productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men's Hush White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, flattened seam and printed labelFittingComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Worship silence for a great start to your day in this white t-shirt from urban yoga. The graphic on the front depicts the manifestation of silence in peace. A stitched label has been carefully avoided and replaced with a printed one to ensure comfort at it's best. Seams around the sides have been flattened with special care to avoid abrasion. Team this tee with yoga pants for a rejuvenating session of  yoga or wear it with jeans as casual wear. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2”, Shoulders-19"
